formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
Here's a JSON array with relevant formulas for Accounting Ratios:

[
  {
    "name": "Debt-Equity Ratio",
    "formula": "Debt-Equity Ratio = (Total Debt / Total Share Capital)",
    "variables": "Total Debt: Total liabilities excluding current liabilities; Total Share Capital: Total equity",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Interest Coverage Ratio",
    "formula": "Interest Coverage Ratio = (Operating Profit / Interest Expenses)",
    "variables": "Operating Profit: Net profit before taxes; Interest Expenses: Total interest paid",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Current Ratio",
    "formula": "Current Ratio = (Current Assets / Current Liabilities)",
    "variables": "Current Assets: Assets that can be converted into cash within a year; Current Liabilities: Liabilities that are due within a year",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Acid Test Ratio",
    "formula": "Acid Test Ratio = (Current Assets - Stocks) / Current Liabilities",
    "variables": "Current Assets: Assets that can be converted into cash within a year; Current Liabilities: Liabilities that are due within a year; Stocks: Inventory",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Asset Turnover Ratio",
    "formula": "Asset Turnover Ratio = (Net Sales / Total Assets)",
    "variables": "Net Sales: Total sales made; Total Assets: Total assets of the business",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Return on Equity (ROE)",
    "formula": "Return on Equity (ROE) = (Net Profit / Total Share Capital) × 100",
    "variables": "Net Profit: Net income after taxes; Total Share Capital: Total equity",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Return on Capital Employed (ROCE)",
    "formula": "Return on Capital Employed (ROCE) = (Net Profit / Capital Employed) × 100",
    "variables": "Net Profit: Net income after taxes; Capital Employed: Total assets - Current liabilities",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  }
]

Note: The formulas provided are directly applicable to the given data for quick numerical solving in the context of Accounting Ratios.
